📋 Daily Workflow — After Market
1
Before 9:15 AM — Mandate All (10 sec)
ICICI Direct → Demat Holdings → Mandate All. If button missing at open, wait till 9:20 AM after first GTT fires. If GTT rejected → Add Mandate for that stock → place sell manually → verify original GTT cancelled.
2
If a GTT fires — Log it here (1 min)
Cycles tab → Daily Log → select Buy/Sell Executed → pick stock → enter qty and price → Add Entry. Portfolio, qty, realized P&L and GTT update instantly. No manual editing needed.
3
After close — Update Prices (2 min)
Tap ₹ Prices → fill CMPs from ICICI Direct portfolio screen → Apply. Saves to device. Next day your last prices are pre-filled.
Weekly Sunday: Share Portfolio + GTT screenshots with Claude → audit + updated files → drag to Netlify (5 min).
NSE Monthly F&O Expiry
Monthly expiry. Review all sell GTTs.
19 Jun 2026
L&T Board Meeting
L&T board. LARTOU sells 4300/4500 active.
20 Jun 2026
🔔 DDPI Mandate — every morning before 9:15 AM
ICICI Direct → Demat Holdings → Mandate All. If button absent at open, wait till 9:20 AM. If GTT rejected → Add Mandate for that stock → place sell manually → verify original GTT cancelled.

Self-balancing: Sells replenish cash → buy GTTs already live. Buy fires → set sell GTTs (FSP) → next sell restores cash. Only action needed: When stock fully exits → deploy cash to Results Season FD.
📅 Operating Rhythm
DAILY
☐ Mandate All before 9:15 AM
☐ Sell fires → no GTT action
☐ Buy fires → set sell GTTs
WEEKLY
☐ Full exit? → deploy to FD
☐ GTTs within 3% next week?
☐ Upload screenshots
MONTHLY
☐ Stock 40%+ above GTTs? Reset
☐ Results season in 2 wks?
☐ Full exit → Results FD

📐 When to use Fib Planner: You want to add a new stock or add more levels to an existing position. Enter the CMP, choose a first dip % (typically 5–8%) and step between levels (5%). The output shows exact GTT prices to enter in ICICI Direct and total capital needed.

Practical rule: Only set GTTs if total ladder cost fits within your available buffer. For existing stocks, only add levels deeper than what you already have set. Use the output to fill in ICICI GTT fields directly.

ENGINE 1 · SPIRAL CYCLES
Buy GTTs armed in ICICI Direct. Price falls → buys automatically → available limits fund it → stock rallies → sell GTT fires → capital + profit returns → next cycle. No manual action needed.
Potential if all sell GTTs fire +₹62,463
Exit capital freed (none pending) ~₹0

ENGINE 3 · COMPOUNDING LOOP
Every sell GTT fires → full sale value returns to available limits → funds next buy level. Capital compounds each rotation.

📋 How to Populate This Dashboard
P&L figures (Invested, Realized, Unrealized) come automatically from your portfolio holdings and the trades you log in Cycles → Daily Log. Keep logging every BUY_EXEC and SELL_EXEC there and P&L stays current.
XIRR needs your cash deposit dates. Go to Cash Flows tab → add each deposit you made to ICICI Direct (date + amount). You can find these in ICICI Direct → Reports → Ledger Statement. Just the deposits, not individual trades.
Charges go in the Charges tab → add a monthly charges entry from your contract note total. Or add per-trade charges when logging sells in the Cycle Log (the ₹23.60 / ₹4.72 toggle).

1st sell of a stock per day₹20 + GST = ₹23.60

Before 15 May 2026₹20 flat per stock per day
